Features.title: SEED Tech & Features
Features.description: Combining latest camera technologies and AI to offer you a complete sports experience elevating your game.

cameras4k.title: 4K Cameras in Every Court
cameras4k.desc: High precision cameras installed in strategic angles recording every moment of your match with extreme accuracy.

aiAnalysis.title: Instant AI Analysis
aiAnalysis.desc: Advanced AI system analyzes your performance immediately after match and provides detailed reports and recommendations.

shotTracking.title: Shot & Ball Tracking
shotTracking.desc: Precise tracking for ball path, speed, and rebound area, with analysis for every forehand and backhand.

performance.title: Physical Performance Stats
performance.desc: Measuring distance covered, movement speed, and coverage areas in court during match.

booking.title: Fast & Easy Booking
booking.desc: Book your favorite court in seconds through the app with advance booking up to a week.

smartApp.title: Integrated Smart App
smartApp.desc: Easy-to-use app combining booking, analysis, videos, and stats in one place.

challenges.title: Challenges & Competitions
challenges.desc: Participate in tournaments and challenges with other players and compare stats with community.

progress.title: Progress Tracking
progress.desc: Monitor your level evolution over time through graphs and historical stats.

AISection.title: What does AI analyze?
AISection.description: Our smart system analyzes every aspect of your game to provide precise insights helping you evolve.

movement.title: Movement Analysis
movement.desc: Track your movement in court: Distance covered, Response speed.

recommendations.title: Smart Recommendations
recommendations.desc: Customized recommendations to improve weaknesses and boost strengths.

progress.title: Progress Tracking
progress.desc: Monitor your level evolution over time with detailed stats.

shot.title: Shot Analysis
shot.desc: Precise analysis for every shot: Speed, Spin, Angle, Rebound area.

AdvancedAnalytics.title: Advanced Performance Analytics
AdvancedAnalytics.description: Track your performance with precision. From ball speed to distance covered, get professional statistics that help you improve your game in every match.

power.title: Power & Speed Analysis
power.desc: Measure your shot precision and smash power with high precision using advanced computer vision.

heatmap.title: Movement Heatmap
heatmap.desc: Understand your movement patterns on the court and discover your areas of dominance and coverage gaps.

progress.title: Progress Tracking
progress.desc: Monitor your level evolution over time with detailed charts and comparisons against other players.

BusinessPage.title: Your Partner in Sports Success
BusinessPage.description: Integrated solutions for companies, court owners, and strategic partners.

partner.title: Join as Partner
partner.desc: Be part of our success story and share our growth.

owner.title: Join as Court Owner
owner.desc: Manage your court efficiently and increase your revenue.

employees.title: Book for Employees

EmployeesPage.title: Your Team Relationships, A Real Investment.
EmployeesPage.description: Flexible and exclusive packages for companies. Organize tournaments, open days, or periodic bookings at special rates.

team.title: Team Building
team.desc: Sports events designed specifically to increase team bonding.

priority.title: Priority Booking
priority.desc: Priority in peak time bookings and organizing private tournaments.

rates.title: Competitive Rates
rates.desc: Discounts up to 30% on periodic bookings and annual packages.

OwnersPage.title: Register Your Court
OwnersPage.description: Join the largest network of courts in the kingdom and benefit from our advanced booking management tech.

FeaturesTable.title: Everything You Need to Run Your Facility
FeaturesTable.subtitle: SEED gives court owners a complete toolkit to manage bookings, grow revenue, and delight players.
FeaturesTable.subscriptionNote: All of this with one subscription

booking.title: Smart Booking Management
booking.desc: Real-time reservations, cancellations, and rescheduling in one dashboard

revenue.title: Revenue & Earnings Dashboard
revenue.desc: Track daily income, payouts, and financial summaries at a glance

pricing.title: Dynamic Pricing Control
pricing.desc: Set peak and off-peak rates, hourly pricing, and seasonal adjustments

analytics.title: Analytics & Insights
analytics.desc: Occupancy rates, popular time slots, and player demographics

multicourt.title: Multi-Court Support
multicourt.desc: Manage multiple courts across one or many facilities from a single account

promotions.title: Promotions & Discounts
promotions.desc: Create custom offers, discount codes, and seasonal deals for players

customers.title: Customer Management
customers.desc: View player profiles, booking history, and loyalty data

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.desc: Block time slots for maintenance, private events, or recurring reservations

staff.title: Staff Accounts & Permissions
staff.desc: Add staff with role-based access — cashier, manager, or viewer

payments.title: Secure Online Payments
payments.desc: Accept online payments, generate invoices, and receive automatic payouts

mobile.title: Mobile App Access
mobile.desc: Manage your facility on the go via the SEED iOS & Android app

ai.title: AI-Powered Insights
ai.desc: Smart pricing recommendations and peak-time optimisation powered by SEED AI

notifications.title: Real-time Notifications
notifications.desc: Instant alerts for new bookings, cancellations, and player reviews

reviews.title: Customer Reviews & Ratings
reviews.desc: View and respond to player feedback directly from your dashboard

waitlist.title: Waitlist Management
waitlist.desc: Auto-fill cancelled slots from a player waitlist to maximise utilisation

reports.title: Reports & Exports
reports.desc: Generate and export PDF or Excel reports for any time period

support.title: 24/7 Dedicated Support
support.desc: Priority support channel exclusively for facility owners

qr.title: QR Code Check-in
qr.desc: Contactless player check-in via a unique QR code — no app required

discovery.title: Discovery Map Listing
discovery.desc: Appear prominently on SEED's in-app court discovery map

marketing.title: Marketing & Promotions Reach
marketing.desc: Promote your facility to thousands of active SEED players

vision.title: Our Vision

mission.title: Our Mission

TechSection.title: Powered by Intelligence

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: Using latest technologies to deliver unique sports experience

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: Committing to highest quality standards in our services and courts

development.title: Development
development.desc: Helping players continuously develop their skills
